_note: Operator-declared editorial values for the CDS certification-overview package (CDS-CSO-PUB / CDS-CSO-SVC / CDS-CSO-FID). scripts/build-cds-overview.py reads this plus the system profile and the canonical inventory to emit /.well-known/certification-overview-package.json. Honest placeholders are used where a value requires sponsorship the PoC does not have (FedRAMP ID, UEI).
fedramp_id: <not assigned — unsponsored self-attested PoC; CDS-CSO-FID placeholder>
service_description: A static personal website on AWS that doubles as a working continuous-compliance pipeline: every deploy derives signed, machine-readable compliance artifacts from one canonical inventory and publishes them under /.well-known/. Includes the Silk Reeling Mirror application, a Cognito-gated Tai Chi coaching API.
current_independent_assessment_service: None — self-attested; no FedRAMP-Recognized independent assessment service engaged (IVV is N/A for this unsponsored proof of concept).

cryptographic_modules.role: key store for all four customer-managed CMKs (at-rest, runtime-signing, DNSSEC KSK, app secret)
at-rest on the public website + log buckets

cryptographic_modules.validation: ECDSA P-256 (FIPS-approved algorithm); the implementations are NOT CMVP-validated modules
cryptographic_modules.compensating_control: trust anchored in the public Rekor transparency log

services.name: samaydlette.com static website
services.description: Public static content (S3 origin behind CloudFront), plus the signed compliance artifacts published under /.well-known/.

services.name: Silk Reeling Mirror application
services.description: Cognito-gated HTTP API (API Gateway -> Lambda) serving a browser SPA that coaches Tai Chi; calls the external Anthropic API for feedback text (interconnection tracked as POAM-020).
